name.description: The name of the self-service Profile.

allowed_strategies.description: List of IdP strategies that will be shown to users during the Self-Service Enterprise Configuration flow. Possible values: [`oidc`, `samlp`, `waad`, `google-apps`, `adfs`, `okta`, `auth0-samlp`, `okta-samlp`, `keycloak-samlp`, `pingfederate`]

user_attribute_profile_id.description: ID of the user-attribute-profile to associate with this self-service profile.
